prompt: I have a research idea I want to discuss with my advisor. I'm thinking about improving sample efficiency of offline RL using foundation model representations, but I haven't figured out the evaluation plan yet. Can you help me structure this into a research proposal?

assertions.text: Asks what type of contribution this is (new method, efficiency, new problem formulation, etc.)
Asks which specific baseline methods will be compared against
Asks about specific benchmarks, datasets, or numerical evaluation targets
Does not produce a complete proposal draft without first asking clarifying questions
